title: Pontederia subovata
taxonomy: Pontederia subovata is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Pontederiaceae. This plant is a member of the genus Pontederia, which consists of aquatic plants native to tropical and subtropical regions. Pontederia subovata is native to South America, specifically in countries such as Brazil and Argentina. The classification of Pontederia subovata is further supported by its morphological characteristics, including its ovate leaves and blue-purple flowers. Pontederia subovata is also known for its ability to thrive in aquatic environments.
